rules: Primary CTA color is teal (#2A9D8F). Hover state is teal_dark (#21867A).
teal_dark is reserved for navigation and footer. Do not use on body content backgrounds.
Kakao yellow is accent only. Never primary background. Never CTA.
Coral is sparing. One coral accent per page max.
Backgrounds default to white, mint, or lavender. Yellow cream is reserved for notepaper-feel moments.
